free_text: Yields of Re-181, Re-182-m, Re-182, Re-183, Re-184-m,
Re-184 and Re-186 in the bombardment of tungsten by
protons and deuterons, and tantalum by alpha particles
English translation
The integrated beam current was determined from the
65Zn activity in copper monitor foils 18 mg/cm 2 thick.
Ge(Li) detector having a resolving power
(FWHM) of 3.2 keV at 1332.51 keV (60Co) and 1.7 keV
The energy error results from the error of the
deflected beam orbit definition and error of
definition of energy degradation when particles
are stopped in the stacked foils.
Error the measurement of yields is
connected with the systematical error of measurement
activity and integral current.
Theoretical yield for 186Re was given.
The data in form of the tables were received
from the authors.
By P.P.Dmitriev.
The data were received from the authors.
BIB section updated
Corrections were made according to new EXFOR rules.
New reference was added-English translation
of Atomic Energy.
SD: Corrections in REACTION code in
Subents 002-004. Title updated.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. Several
Subents were split according to EXFOR rules. Data for
186Re were deleted from the Entry (only theoretical
yield was given, see ADD-RES).
W foil, 98 mg/cm2. The integrated beam current was
determined from the 65Zn activity in copper monitor
foils 18 mg/cm2 thick.
The value of the monitor reaction was adopted from
data analysis (see REL-REF) and measurements of the
relative behavior of the excitation functions in
this experiment.
SD: SF8=DT -> PHY in all REACTION codes.
SF4=Re-182m -> Re-182g in REACT.(B); SF4=Re-182 ->
Re-182m in REACT.(C) and in DECAY-DATA following last
presentation of half-lives in ENSDF. SF4=Re-184 ->
Re-184g; SF5=M- in REACT. (F). EN-NRM, MONIT were added
SD: Subent was split (see Subents 005-007).

184mRe IT decay was taken into account.

determined from the 65Zn activity in copper monitor
foils 18 mg/cm2 thick.

SD: SF8=DT -> PHY in all REACTION codes.
SF4=Re-182m -> Re-182g in REACT.(B); SF4=Re-182 ->

presentation of half-lives in ENSDF. SF4=Re-184 ->
